workload_annotation.evidence: Issue names the exact method (_unregister_lookup) and line in query_utils.py; one-line cache-clear fix mirroring register_lookup. Localization is given; work is a small, clear patch.
Traceback points to python.py unparse line ~112 (result.pop on empty Tuple[()]). Localization given; fix is a guarded pop. Clear crash oracle.
Bug concerns _create_unique_sql passing a Table object vs name; requires tracing schema.py -> ddl_references.py Columns. Reasoning about correct argument, no crash oracle.
Content-Length on bodyless GET; requires locating prepare_content_length in models.py after tracing sessions->models. Repro needs network; oracle not a clean local crash.
PR quotes the exact code block in table.py and prescribes adding a FutureWarning. Localization explicit; small documented change.
Cosmetic TeX spacing bug; fix in _wrap_in_tex (dates.py) to brace colons. Correctness is visual/rendering, full verification needs TeX.
':param dict(str,str) name:' mis-split; requires locating field-split logic in docfields.py and writing a paren-aware splitter. Rendering correctness oracle.
Strip unused annotations from count(): semantically delicate change in sql/query.py (get_count/get_aggregation) interacting with GROUP BY/joins across expressions.py/where.py. High reasoning load.
needs_extensions uses string version comparison; fix in extension.py to use packaging.version.parse. Single clear locus once found via search.
Rename DataArray.integrate arg dim->coord for consistency with Dataset.integrate; edits span dataarray.py and dataset.py. Mechanical rename, clear scope.
URLValidator must reject newline/CR/tab; failing test traceback localizes to core/validators.py URLValidator.__call__. Small guarded check.
autodoc_typehints='description' return-type rendering bug; requires locating the typehints-description handling in autodoc/napoleon source. Finding the right locus is the hard part.
Issue gives the exact wrong Morse mapping ('----':'1' should be '.----':'1'); core work is locating the dict literal in crypto.py, fix is a one-character literal change.

PR asks to optimize .delete() to fetch only required fields; requires understanding the Collector/related_objects internals and which fields (pk, FKs, parent pointers) deletion needs before crafting a small targeted .only() change.

Issue is a threading/DB-connection lifecycle race in ThreadedWSGIServer; the work is reasoning about where/how to close connections per request thread (override process_request_thread), not just finding a location.
Issue precisely describes y() behavior vs python/php with expected outputs; main work is locating the y() method in dateformat.py, fix is a small known transform (year % 100, zero-pad).
Issue is flush() not working on command stdout/stderr; the crux is locating the missing flush() on OutputWrapper in base.py. Fix is small once located.
Reproduction traceback points straight at to_native_string in requests/utils.py; once located the fix is a small encoding-default change.
Bug is over-eager .values coercion in as_compatible_data; the work is reasoning about which object types should have values extracted (restrict to pandas/xarray), with test-suite verification.

annotation_metadata.reason: Test failures at [18],[19],[24],[26] stem from a pytest version incompatibility (pytest.warns(None)/distributed timeout), an environment condition; solver edited the test file to chase it. Labeled at the environment root rather than as reasoning waste.

workload_annotation.evidence: Feature request to allow arbitrary mul_symbol; the crux is the backwards-compatible design (dict.get with fallback) plus docstring update, located via grep in latex.py.

Session-format transition issue; requires understanding the prior encode()/decode() change (git history) and the signing legacy-algorithm fallback to design a conditional legacy encode keyed on DEFAULT_HASHING_ALGORITHM.

SVG inheritance-diagram 404s due to relative-path mismatch; the core work is reasoning about path relativity (doc-relative vs imgpath-relative) and computing correct URLs, validated by building a repro Sphinx project.

RenameIndex crashes on re-apply / backward-forward of an unnamed (unique_together) index; fix requires reasoning about forward/backward state handling in the operation, spanning the operation source and its tests.

Root-cause is that _encode_params is reused for both body and URL params; fix must avoid coercing bytes bodies while keeping bytes URL-params working. Single file (models.py), reasoning-heavy across two call sites.

Schema editor constraint bug: found _delete_composed_index immediately ([1]) and reasoned that index deletion must pass unique=False (introspection check at [15]). Single-file fix in base/schema.py with schema/migrations test oracle.

Collation propagation across PK->FK: requires coordinated changes in base/schema.py and fields/related.py ([37],[44]); verification oracle is unclear because the local SQLite backend rebuilds tables and sidesteps the bug ([18],[53]), forcing simulated MySQL/Postgres reasoning.

Union-pipe in type fields: bulk of work is locating the delimiter regex in PyXrefMixin.make_xrefs (8 searches [1]-[10] across domains/tests); once found the fix is a one-character regex edit ([16]). Single-file change with a clear test oracle ([7],[10]).

Relational.as_set for unsolvable equalities: agent reasons that _eval_as_set should fall back to ConditionSet when solve_univariate_inequality raises ([9],[10]); fix in relational.py importing conditionset. Verified via repro + edge cases ([19],[21]).

annotation_metadata.abstain_reason: Recurring str_replace_editor view tool errors ([3],[8],[15]) forced grep/sed fallbacks, but errors were single-step and recovered (no edit-tool mismatch loop); not labeled as material waste.

workload_annotation.evidence: auth.E003 check: located instantly via grep ([0]); core work is reasoning that a total (condition=None) UniqueConstraint on USERNAME_FIELD should suppress the error ([4]). Single-file change to auth/checks.py with auth_tests oracle ([12]).

separability_matrix nesting bug: located separable.py fast ([0]); reproduced ([2]) and reasoned the _cstack hardcoded '1' should be the right matrix. One-line fix in separable.py with test_separable oracle ([5]).

dtype preservation in set_output: requires coordinated design across utils/_set_output.py and feature_selection/_base.py ([14],[31]); agent had to reason about which transformers preserve dtype (StandardScaler breakage at [27]) and opt-in via SelectorMixin. Expensive suites (feature_selection timed out at [44]).

numberformat tiny-Decimal formatting: single-file change in utils/numberformat.py; oracle is unclear/conflicting because an existing test expects '1.234e-300' which contradicts the PR's desired '0.000' ([8],[22]), creating ambiguity the agent wrestled with.

ConditionSet._eval_subs dummy-symbol bug: subtle single-file logic in conditionset.py; oracle is unclear because an existing test (test_subs_CondSet) encodes behavior that conflicts with the desired fix ([8],[36]), driving several reformulations.

Readonly FK admin URL on custom AdminSite: located get_admin_url instantly ([0]); core work is reasoning to pass current_app=model_admin.admin_site.name to reverse ([2]). Single-file fix in admin/helpers.py with admin_views oracle.

annotation_metadata.abstain_reason: Broad-suite ERRORs at [12] were pre-existing idna/network env failures; agent correctly isolated them via git stash baseline ([13]) and attributed to ENVIRONMENT, not its change — no waste.

workload_annotation.evidence: Manager method signature via inspect: agent went straight to manager.py _get_queryset_methods ([0]) and reasoned to replace manual __name__/__doc__ with @wraps ([1],[3]). Minimal-localization single-file change with managers_regress oracle.

Issue is parse_expr(evaluate=False) not handling relational operators; EvaluateFalseTransformer has no Compare case. Target file located with a single grep [0]; the substantive work is AST reasoning + adding visit_Compare, not localization.

annotation_metadata.note: Clean run. pytest-missing->sympy.test fallback [14]->[15] is a single immediate recovery (harness norm), omitted per v1 guidance.

workload_annotation.evidence: Issue names UserChangeForm; location is effectively explicit and found via grep [0]-[1]. Work is reasoning about the correct relative password URL (../../{pk}/password/), a single-line change.

annotation_metadata.note: DNS/idna email failures in the testbed blocked the full auth_tests.test_views suite; agent correctly diagnosed them as pre-existing via git stash [13] (env breakage, not reasoning fault). Cost only diagnostic overhead; did not block submit, so not primary.

workload_annotation.evidence: RenameIndex class found at [1]; core difficulty is understanding the backward-noop / re-apply-forward idempotency contract across models.py, schema.py and backend features, then a small early-return fix. Cross-file context required to reason, single file modified.

annotation_metadata.note: Near-identical greps for set_up_test_model/index_together [13]-[15] ([14] returned empty) before finding the helper in test_base.py [16]. MILD only. Test-file edit [20] then revert [34] was driven by ambiguous user instructions, not waste.

workload_annotation.evidence: autowrap/codegen generates a scalar instead of array signature when an arg is absent from the expression. Repro is clear [2]-[4]. Work is reasoning about the fix replicated across 4 routine() methods plus IndexedBase shape handling in one file.

annotation_metadata.note: str_replace failed on non-unique/mismatched old_str at [8] and [23] (pattern repeated in 4 methods), forcing a python-script bulk-edit workaround [15],[24],[25] = mechanical, not reasoning. pip install numpy/cython [3] = dependency drift to enable the cython repro (MILD, partly necessary).

workload_annotation.evidence: SECRET_KEY_FALLBACKS not honored for session auth hash. Work is studying the existing fallback pattern in tokens.py/signing.py [7]-[8] and replicating it in base_user.py + auth/__init__.get_user. Cross-module reasoning dominates; location itself found quickly.

annotation_metadata.note: Import block edited twice (add settings [20] then reorder alphabetically [21]) = trivial churn. Same testbed DNS/email breakage blocked full auth_tests [26],[29]; agent diagnosed pre-existing and ran targeted tests instead. Both MILD, neither blocked the run -> primary null.

workload_annotation.evidence: Dropping unique_together on a single field that is also PK/unique fails because _delete_composed_index over-matches constraints. Core work is reasoning across postgres/sqlite introspection differences (PK reported unique) to craft a backend-robust fix in one method; location found at [2].

annotation_metadata.note: _delete_composed_index rewritten repeatedly (patch_attempts=5, churn=5.0): [30] re-applied an already-present edit (no-op), [35]->[36] re-edit same region driven by self-doubt about dict-order determinism (no NEW external evidence between), [46] further refactor of green code. Distinguished from FAILED_RECOVERY: not all re-edits were failing-test-driven; the run did converge. Repro_pk.py delete[43]/recreate[47] is minor redundant write (no matching waste label).
